Marazul Resort  ·  Cancún

Marina
SEFA.

Marina seca en Cancún para yates, veleros y catamaranes de hasta 60 pies y 30 toneladas, con operación confiable, maniobras seguras y seguridad 24/7.

Visit Marina Seca Cancun ← Back to Resort
Marina Reliable Operation

Marina Brief

Fast maneuvers.
Real infrastructure.
Total confidence.

In Puerto Juarez, Cancun, Marina Seca Cancun has over 20 years of experience handling every vessel with precision, specialized equipment and trained staff.

If you want a marina that responds quickly and gives you clear control from arrival to launch, this is where to start. Click and coordinate your maneuver directly with their team.

  • Launch and lift maneuvers for boats up to 60 ft and 30 tons
  • Unique hydraulic towing system in the region with high-power support equipment
  • Dry storage and pension service with continuous supervision
  • T-dock, dedicated ramp and optimized access for agile operations
  • Maintenance, repairs and PPF protection in the same facility
  • Direct contact by WhatsApp or phone to coordinate quickly
Go to Marina Seca Cancun
60 ft Max vessel length
30 t Max maneuver weight
24/7 Security and controlled access
20+ Years operating in Cancun
